faqs.question: What are your store hours?
faqs.answer: Ansira Book Shop is open Monday–Saturday 9:00 AM–8:00 PM and Sunday 10:00 AM–6:00 PM.

faqs.question: Do you offer free shipping?
faqs.answer: Yes. Orders over $35 qualify for free standard shipping within the continental US.

faqs.question: What is your return policy?
faqs.answer: Unopened books may be returned within 30 days with receipt for a full refund. Opened items may be exchanged for store credit.

faqs.question: How can I track my order?
faqs.answer: Use the chat: say 'Check my order' followed by your order ID, or check your confirmation email for a tracking link.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept major credit cards, debit cards, PayPal, and Apple Pay for online orders.

faqs.question: Do you have a loyalty program?
faqs.answer: Yes. Earn 1 point per dollar spent; 100 points equals $5 off your next purchase.

faqs.question: Can I cancel an order?
faqs.answer: You can cancel placed orders before they ship by saying 'Cancel my order' with your order ID here in chat.

faqs.question: Do you sell e-books?
faqs.answer: We primarily stock physical books. Selected titles are available as e-books—search by title or ask us in chat.

faqs.question: How long does delivery take?
faqs.answer: Standard shipping is 3–5 business days; express options are available at checkout.

faqs.question: Is my payment information secure?
faqs.answer: Yes. We use industry-standard encryption and never store full card numbers on our servers.

faqs.question: Do you gift wrap?
faqs.answer: Gift wrapping is available for $3.99 per item—mention it when placing your order notes.

faqs.question: Can I reserve a book?
faqs.answer: You can place an order to reserve in-stock items; we hold reservations for 48 hours after confirmation.

faqs.question: Where is the store located?
faqs.answer: Our flagship store is at 123 Literary Lane, Booktown. Online orders ship nationwide.

faqs.question: Do you price match?
faqs.answer: We match listed prices from major US retailers for identical ISBNs within 7 days of purchase.

faqs.question: How do I contact support?
faqs.answer: Chat here anytime, email support@ansira.ai, or call 1-800-BOOK-HELP during business hours.
